name: DTE ENERGY CO
summary: DTE Energy Co is a diversified energy company headquartered in Michigan. It operates through subsidiaries including DTE Electric, which provides electric utility services, and DTE Gas, which provides natural gas utility services. The company also engages in non-utility businesses including energy trading and marketing of natural gas, electricity, and environmental commodities.
